_comment: Copy this file to orchestrator_config.json and fill in real values. Do NOT commit orchestrator_config.json (it contains credentials).
_comment_manifest: Path to the Excel manifest (relative to workspace root or absolute).
_comment_workspace: Absolute path to the repo root on the machine running the orchestrator.
_comment_state: Latest per-row state written by writeback_results.py; used for staleness checks.
_comment_triggers: Directory where trigger records (JSON) are saved.
_comment_polling: How long to wait in the Jenkins queue before giving up (seconds).
_comment_polling2: How often to poll build status (seconds).
_comment_timeout: Give up polling if build takes longer than this (seconds). 4h default.
_comment_job_params: These are merged on top of the defaults in trigger_jenkins.py.
